content.content: TikTok personality and content creator best known for her _alexandramarasigan account. She shares trending dance and lip sync performances set to popular sounds. She has more than 2.8 million followers on the platform. She posted her first lip sync video on TikTok in March 2022. In December of 2022, her "koala toy being hung at the back L" video went viral with more than 2 million views. She shared her entire shoe collection in one of her TikToks. She was born in Australia. She sometimes creates review videos with her sibling Angelo Marasigan. She created a TikTok set to a sped-upEd Sheeransong.
